x402_context.purpose: Use CMC x402 pay-per-request data access when an agent has USDC on Base and no CMC API key.

candidate_requests.name: latest_quotes
candidate_requests.reason: Refresh large-cap anchor prices before strategy generation.

candidate_requests.name: technical_analysis
candidate_requests.reason: Refresh RSI, MACD, EMA, and ATR pre-computed indicators.

candidate_requests.name: trending_narratives
candidate_requests.reason: Refresh narrative momentum and related assets.

candidate_requests.name: dex_security_liquidity
candidate_requests.reason: Screen BNB Chain narrative assets before inclusion.

guardrails: This script does not connect a wallet.
This script does not sign x402 payments.
A user or agent runtime must enforce the max budget before any paid request.
Paid data must still pass strategy validation and risk checks.
